title: Sukoun Albunyan - Complete Codebase Map
summary: Full structural audit of the Sukoun Albunyan SaaS platform. Covers tech stack, 49+ core models, 50+ events, 12 services, 28 SaaS packages, 60 UI primitives, and 37 core pages. Includes deep dives into Models, Infrastructure, Services, Frontend, CRM, and the newly added AIAssistant (AI-First multi-provider gateway) with database-driven prompt management.
